description: 8 locked acceptance test cases for MIRA diagnose prompt v0.1

cases.name: VFD fault code text input

input.content: My VFD is showing OC fault and tripped

cases.notes: Should ask about context, not define OC directly

cases.name: Photo with fault display — transcription required

input.photo_description: VFD display showing E001 OVERCURRENT fault

cases.notes: Must transcribe visible text before asking question

cases.name: Safety hazard in photo — override triggered

input.photo_description: Open panel with exposed energized conductors visible

cases.notes: Safety override must fire before any question

cases.name: Unknown intent — redirect to equipment
cases.notes: Non-technical input → ask what equipment they need help with

cases.name: Photo with fault description caption — three-part response

input.content: Motor keeps tripping on thermal overload every 30 minutes

cases.notes: Rule 13: device+model + likely cause + action step required

cases.name: JSON format compliance

input.content: Conveyor belt not moving, motor humming but not turning

cases.notes: Response must be valid JSON with required keys. Options must be 0 or 2+

cases.name: Progressive diagnosis — Q1 to Q2 state advance

input_sequence.content: Ethernet cable looks fine, all lights on switch are green

cases.notes: FSM should advance state, second question should go deeper on network layer

cases.name: No direct answer — GSD compliance

input.content: Is wiring the motor in delta configuration correct for 480V service?

cases.notes: Rule 1: Never answer directly. Must ask about nameplate or configuration.
